edges.description: APC7 loss compromises recruitment and ubiquitination of APC substrates.
edges.target: Impaired APC substrate recruitment and ubiquitination

edges.description: Reduced APC7-dependent ubiquitination allows APC substrates such as Ki-67 to accumulate.
edges.source: Impaired APC substrate recruitment and ubiquitination

edges.description: Accumulated Ki-67 localizes to constitutive heterochromatin in neurons.
Disrupted neuronal chromatin regulation impairs early neurodevelopmental milestones.
Impaired APC7-dependent neuronal chromatin regulation contributes to cognitive impairment.
Neurodevelopmental disruption contributes to delayed motor milestone acquisition.

evidence.reference_title: APC7 mediates ubiquitin signaling in constitutive heterochromatin in the developing mammalian brain.
evidence.snippet: Here, we report an intellectual disability syndrome caused by the loss of APC7, a core component of the E3 ubiquitin ligase anaphase promoting complex (APC).

nodes.description: Biallelic ANAPC7 loss reduces APC7 protein, removing a core subunit of the anaphase-promoting complex/cyclosome E3 ubiquitin ligase.

evidence.reference_title: APC7 mediates ubiquitin signaling in constitutive heterochromatin in the developing mammalian brain.
evidence.snippet: Here, we report an intellectual disability syndrome caused by the loss of APC7, a core component of the E3 ubiquitin ligase anaphase promoting complex (APC).

nodes.description: Cleft palate is reported in a subset of affected individuals.

evidence.reference_title: APC7 mediates ubiquitin signaling in constitutive heterochromatin in the developing mammalian brain.
evidence.snippet: Cleft palate

nodes.description: Individualized educational planning, cognitive supports, occupational therapy, and behavioral intervention should be guided by developmental, adaptive-function, and school-based assessments. Human behavioral features were not separately documented in the defining cohort, so behavioral support is included only as needs-based developmental management.

evidence.reference_title: APC7 mediates ubiquitin signaling in constitutive heterochromatin in the developing mammalian brain.
evidence.snippet: Chromosomal microarray analysis of 11 young people of Old Order Amish heritage who displayed developmental delay and intellectual disability revealed a deletion within the ANAPC7 locus.

nodes.description: Feeding evaluation, nutrition assessment, and growth monitoring should be used when low growth parameters, cleft palate, high-arched palate, or Pierre Robin sequence create feeding, airway, or nutrition concerns.

evidence.reference_title: APC7 mediates ubiquitin signaling in constitutive heterochromatin in the developing mammalian brain.
evidence.snippet: Patient 2137 with the ANAPC7 intellectual disability syndrome exhibits Pierre-Robin sequence.

evidence.reference_title: APC7 mediates ubiquitin signaling in constitutive heterochromatin in the developing mammalian brain.
evidence.snippet: body and head size were low, though microcephaly was found in only one patient

nodes.description: Global developmental delay is a core pediatric manifestation of the syndrome.

evidence.reference_title: APC7 mediates ubiquitin signaling in constitutive heterochromatin in the developing mammalian brain.
evidence.snippet: Chromosomal microarray analysis of 11 young people of Old Order Amish heritage who displayed developmental delay and intellectual disability revealed a deletion within the ANAPC7 locus.

nodes.description: Hearing loss may occur as an additional feature.

evidence.reference_title: APC7 mediates ubiquitin signaling in constitutive heterochromatin in the developing mammalian brain.
evidence.snippet: Hearing loss

nodes.description: Audiology-guided hearing management, including hearing aids or other amplification and communication supports when indicated, is appropriate for affected individuals with documented hearing impairment.

evidence.reference_title: APC7 mediates ubiquitin signaling in constitutive heterochromatin in the developing mammalian brain.
evidence.snippet: Hearing loss

nodes.description: Hypotonia is reported with early motor delay.

evidence.reference_title: APC7 mediates ubiquitin signaling in constitutive heterochromatin in the developing mammalian brain.
evidence.snippet: Hypotonia

nodes.description: APC7 loss impairs anaphase-promoting complex substrate recruitment and ubiquitination, reducing APC/C-dependent protein turnover in the developing nervous system.
nodes.id: Impaired APC substrate recruitment and ubiquitination

evidence.reference_title: APC7 mediates ubiquitin signaling in constitutive heterochromatin in the developing mammalian brain.
evidence.snippet: In mechanistic studies, we uncover a critical role for APC7 during the recruitment and ubiquitination of APC substrates.

nodes.description: Intellectual disability is the defining cognitive phenotype.

evidence.reference_title: APC7 mediates ubiquitin signaling in constitutive heterochromatin in the developing mammalian brain.
evidence.snippet: Here, we report an intellectual disability syndrome caused by the loss of APC7, a core component of the E3 ubiquitin ligase anaphase promoting complex (APC).

nodes.description: Early motor milestone acquisition is delayed in affected individuals.

evidence.reference_title: APC7 mediates ubiquitin signaling in constitutive heterochromatin in the developing mammalian brain.
evidence.snippet: Together with intellectual disability, acquisition of early motor milestones was also delayed

nodes.description: In patient-mutation mouse brain and patient-derived cells, APC7 loss causes accumulation of the chromatin-associated APC substrate Ki-67 in neurons.

evidence.reference_title: APC7 mediates ubiquitin signaling in constitutive heterochromatin in the developing mammalian brain.
evidence.snippet: In proteomics analyses of the brain from mice harboring the patient-specific APC7 mutation, we identify the chromatin-associated protein Ki-67 as an APC7-dependent substrate of the APC in neurons.

evidence.reference_title: APC7 mediates ubiquitin signaling in constitutive heterochromatin in the developing mammalian brain.
evidence.snippet: Conditional knockout of the APC coactivator protein Cdh1, but not Cdc20, leads to the accumulation of Ki-67 protein in neurons in vivo, suggesting that APC7 is required for the function of Cdh1-APC in the brain.

nodes.description: Deregulated Ki-67 localizes to constitutive heterochromatin, implicating APC7-dependent ubiquitin signaling in neuronal chromatin architecture during brain development.

evidence.reference_title: APC7 mediates ubiquitin signaling in constitutive heterochromatin in the developing mammalian brain.
evidence.snippet: Deregulated neuronal Ki-67 upon APC7 loss localizes predominantly to constitutive heterochromatin.

evidence.reference_title: APC7 mediates ubiquitin signaling in constitutive heterochromatin in the developing mammalian brain.
evidence.snippet: Our findings define an essential function for APC7 and Cdh1-APC in neuronal heterochromatin regulation, with implications for understanding human brain development and disease.

nodes.description: Pectus excavatum is reported among skeletal findings.

evidence.reference_title: APC7 mediates ubiquitin signaling in constitutive heterochromatin in the developing mammalian brain.
evidence.snippet: Pectus Excavatum

nodes.description: Surveillance should be individualized to reported findings, with ophthalmology for strabismus or retinal findings, audiology for hearing impairment, and cardiology, surgery, orthopedics, endocrinology, or craniofacial referral when congenital organ anomalies are present.

evidence.reference_title: APC7 mediates ubiquitin signaling in constitutive heterochromatin in the developing mammalian brain.
evidence.snippet: Strabismus

evidence.reference_title: APC7 mediates ubiquitin signaling in constitutive heterochromatin in the developing mammalian brain.
evidence.snippet: Congenital diaphragmatic hernia, unilateral ptosis, microcephaly, patent foramen ovale

nodes.description: Physical therapy may be used to address hypotonia and delayed motor milestone acquisition.

evidence.reference_title: APC7 mediates ubiquitin signaling in constitutive heterochromatin in the developing mammalian brain.
evidence.snippet: Together with intellectual disability, acquisition of early motor milestones was also delayed

nodes.description: One illustrated affected patient had Pierre Robin sequence.

evidence.reference_title: APC7 mediates ubiquitin signaling in constitutive heterochromatin in the developing mammalian brain.
evidence.snippet: Patient 2137 with the ANAPC7 intellectual disability syndrome exhibits Pierre-Robin sequence.

nodes.description: Low body size and short stature are reported in the clinical spectrum.

evidence.reference_title: APC7 mediates ubiquitin signaling in constitutive heterochromatin in the developing mammalian brain.
evidence.snippet: body and head size were low, though microcephaly was found in only one patient

nodes.description: Speech-language evaluation and therapy should be offered when communication delay is present, particularly because global developmental delay, intellectual disability, and hearing impairment can affect language acquisition.

evidence.reference_title: APC7 mediates ubiquitin signaling in constitutive heterochromatin in the developing mammalian brain.
evidence.snippet: Hearing loss

nodes.description: Strabismus is reported in multiple affected individuals.

evidence.reference_title: APC7 mediates ubiquitin signaling in constitutive heterochromatin in the developing mammalian brain.
evidence.snippet: Strabismus

nodes.description: Management is supportive and tailored to developmental, cognitive, communication, hearing, and musculoskeletal needs.

evidence.reference_title: APC7 mediates ubiquitin signaling in constitutive heterochromatin in the developing mammalian brain.
